introSection: Quantum Leap (Russian: Квантовый скачок) is a steel inverted shuttle roller coaster located at Sochi Park in Sochi, Krasnodar Krai, Russia. It is a Giant Inverted Boomerang installation from Vekoma.
fullText:
Quantum Leap (Russian: Квантовый скачок) is a steel inverted shuttle roller coaster located at Sochi Park in Sochi, Krasnodar Krai, Russia. It is a Giant Inverted Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

Black track and purple supports.
